name: The Siege of Blackmoor
description: Medieval. The keep has fallen in the night. Sir Cedric holds the inner ward alone against the sellsword who took it — the Black Captain. Steel, stone, and smoke, no sorcery. Original content.
author: Genesis Infinity

effects.name: Wounded
effects.description: A blade found a gap in the armor.

effects.name: Shield Broken
effects.description: A crushing blow splinters the shield and leaves the arm ringing.

effects.name: Smoke-Choked
effects.description: Lungs full of gatehouse smoke — every breath a cough.

items.name: Kite Shield
items.description: A tall, iron-rimmed shield bearing a faded crest.

items.name: Plate Harness
items.description: A full harness of well-kept plate — heavy, but it turns most blows.

items.name: Healer's Salve
items.description: A pot of pungent salve that closes cuts and dulls pain.
